title: Abstract
description: Stylize your builds with an assortment of vanilla+ decorative blocks!
body:
Discover a world of creative potential with Abstract. This mod introduces a variety of decorative blocks to add a touch of artistry to your builds. Explore new vanilla block variants and vanilla+ blocks, opening up fresh avenues for your architectural endeavors. Transform your creations subtly and let Abstract enhance the beauty of your Minecraft experience.
🔨 Join our Discord! 🔨
As long as credited, Abstract may be used in modpacks, YouTube videos, etc.
